```mermaid flowchart TB classDef proto fill:#e8f4ff,stroke:#1f6feb,color:#0b1d3a classDef attr fill:#f6f8fa,stroke:#57606a,color:#24292f title[Intermittent Fasting Protocol Family Comparison] subgraph TRE_16_8 [TRE 16:8] A1[Eating window: 8h]:::proto A2[Caloric depth: mild]:::attr A3[Cycle: daily]:::attr A4[Most studied variant]:::attr end subgraph TRE_18_6 [TRE 18:6] B1[Eating window: 6h]:::proto B2[Caloric depth: mild-moderate]:::attr B3[Cycle: daily]:::attr end subgraph ADF [Alternate-Day Fasting] C1[Eating window: full day, alternating]:::proto C2[Caloric depth: ~25% on fast days]:::attr C3[Cycle: every other day]:::attr end subgraph FIVE_TWO [5:2 Protocol] D1[Eating window: 2 fast days/week]:::proto D2[Caloric depth: 500-800 kcal on fast days]:::attr D3[Cycle: weekly]:::attr end subgraph FMD [Fasting-Mimicking Diet] E1[Eating window: 5-day regimen]:::proto E2[Caloric depth: ~25% usual intake]:::attr E3[Cycle: monthly]:::attr E4[Fat- and fiber-rich profile]:::attr end Common[Common mechanism:
periodic interruption of fed state
Pooled weight loss -3.59 kg 95% CI -4.59 to -2.59 [3]] A1 --> Common B1 --> Common C1 --> Common D1 --> Common E1 --> Common ```
